title: plocama calabrica
intro: Plocama calabrica is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, also known as the citrus family, native to the Mediterranean region. It is a succulent shrub with medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains limonene and other terpenes with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plocama calabrica include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Plocama calabrica include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
